name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.6.71 Google sync status persistence and backup control
label: Google sync status persistence and backup control
release_notes: Keeps completed Google Tasks visible, uses plain-language pending/completed status consistently, improves Calendar datetime comparison, and stops normal sync actions creating excessive backups by default.
notes: Completed Google Tasks remain visible in Pathmark
Pending/completed Google Tasks use plain-language status labels
Google Calendar pull comparison parses timezone-aware RFC3339 values correctly
Tasks/Calendar safety backups default to off for normal sync
Added backup cleanup control in Settings
